title: Agent identity: A new access model for Claude Tag
summary: Claude Tag introduces an agent identity model that allows Claude to operate autonomously in Slack channels under its own scoped identity rather than impersonating users. The system is designed for safety in multiplayer sessions, with admin governance and full auditability across different workspaces.
writeup: The video presents Claude Tag, an agent identity model that gives Claude its own scoped identity to operate autonomously in Slack channels instead of impersonating users. This matters because agents acting under borrowed user credentials blur accountability in shared workspaces. Key takeaways: the system targets safety in multiplayer sessions, includes admin governance, and provides full auditability across different workspaces.
